chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3633 - وَ قَالَ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تَبْذُلْ لِإِخْوَانِكَ مِنْ نَفْسِكَ مَا ضَرَرُهُ عَلَيْكَ أَكْثَرُ مِنْ نَفْعِهِ لَهُمْ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3633 - Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) said:
"Do not give to your brothers from yourself what causes you more harm than it benefits them."
